title: Draft plan 05-testing-and-benchmarks
description: Draft the detailed plan doc for 05-testing-and-benchmarks using /plan-draft. Covers: benchmark suite, comparison tests against upstream Rust version, fuzz testing, mutation testing harness, golden file corpus expansion to 500+ commands, grammar-derived coverage analysis, end-to-end tests with real-world command samples, performance profiling and optimization.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Plan 05-testing-and-benchmarks drafted. Plan doc at 7dc1c8f, test harness at 70c9e99. Ready for review.
